mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, NAME AS userName, birth, email, address, phone FROM user WHERE user_id=#{id} AND PASSWORD=#{password}

SELECT sb.name AS subjectName, DATE_FORMAT(start_time, '%H시 %i분') AS startTime, DATE_FORMAT(end_time, '%H시 %i분') AS endTime, lt.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, lt.start_date AS startDate, lt.end_date AS endDate, cr.name AS classroomName, cr.location AS classroomLocation, t.name AS teacherName FROM (SELECT * FROM user WHERE user_id = #{id}) u INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON se.student_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN payment p ON se.enrollment_id = p.enrollment_id INNER JOIN lecture lt ON se.lecture_id = lt.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject sb ON lt.subject_id = sb.subject_id INNER JOIN classroom cr ON lt.classroom_id = cr.classroom_id INNER JOIN teacher_assignment ta ON lt.lecture_id = ta.lecture_id INNER JOIN user t ON ta.teacher_id = t.user_id WHERE CURDATE() <= lt.end_date ORDER BY lt.start_date ASC

SELECT sb.name AS subjectName, t1.name AS teacherName, DATE_FORMAT(start_time, '%H시 %i분') AS startTime, DATE_FORMAT(end_time, '%H시 %i분') AS endTime, lt.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, lt.start_date AS startDate, lt.end_date AS endDate, d.name AS driverName, d.phone AS driverPhone, va.driver_id AS driverId, v.vehicle_no AS vehicleNo, va.location FROM (SELECT * FROM user WHERE user_id = #{id}) u INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON u.user_id = se.student_id INNER JOIN lecture lt ON se.lecture_id = lt.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject sb ON lt.subject_id = sb.subject_id INNER JOIN (SELECT u.name, ta.lecture_id FROM teacher_assignment ta INNER JOIN user u ON ta.teacher_id = u.user_id) t1 ON lt.lecture_id = t1.lecture_id INNER JOIN payment p ON se.enrollment_id = p.enrollment_id INNER JOIN vehicle_assignment va ON se.lecture_id = va.lecture_id INNER JOIN vehicle v ON v.vehicle_id = va.vehicle_id LEFT JOIN user d ON d.user_id = va.driver_id WHERE CURDATE() <= lt.end_date
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notice WHERE target_role_id=2
SELECT notice_id AS noticeId, title, content, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H시 %i분') AS createdAt FROM notice WHERE target_role_id = 2 ORDER BY notice_id desc LIMIT #{beginRow}, #{size}
SELECT notice_id AS noticeId, title, content, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H시 %i분') AS createdAt FROM notice WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId}
SELECT subject_id AS subjectId, NAME AS subjectName FROM subject
SELECT name AS subjectName, description FROM subject WHERE name = #{subjectName}

SELECT ROUND(AVG(sf.rating_lecture), 1) AS avgRating FROM satisfaction sf INNER JOIN payment p ON sf.payment_id = p.payment_id INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON p.enrollment_id = se.enrollment_id INNER JOIN lecture lt ON se.lecture_id = lt.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject sb ON lt.subject_id = sb.subject_id WHERE sb.name = #{subjectName}

SELECT sf.rating_lecture AS ratingLecture, r.content AS content FROM satisfaction sf INNER JOIN payment p ON sf.payment_id = p.payment_id INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON p.enrollment_id = se.enrollment_id INNER JOIN lecture lt ON se.lecture_id = lt.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject sb ON lt.subject_id = sb.subject_id INNER JOIN review r ON sf.satisfaction_id = r.satisfaction_id WHERE sb.name = #{subjectName} ORDER BY r.review_id DESC LIMIT 0, 3

SELECT p.payment_id AS paymentId, s.satisfaction_id AS satisfactionId, r.review_id AS reviewId, sb.name AS subjectName, DATE_FORMAT(start_time, '%H시 %i분') AS startTime, DATE_FORMAT(end_time, '%H시 %i분') AS endTime, lt.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, lt.start_date AS startDate, lt.end_date AS endDate, cr.name AS classroomName, cr.location AS classroomLocation, t.name AS teacherName FROM (SELECT * FROM user WHERE user_id = #{id}) u INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON se.student_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN lecture lt ON se.lecture_id = lt.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject sb ON lt.subject_id = sb.subject_id INNER JOIN classroom cr ON lt.classroom_id = cr.classroom_id INNER JOIN teacher_assignment ta ON lt.lecture_id = ta.lecture_id INNER JOIN user t ON ta.teacher_id = t.user_id LEFT JOIN payment p ON p.enrollment_id = se.enrollment_id LEFT JOIN satisfaction s ON s.payment_id = p.payment_id LEFT JOIN review r ON r.satisfaction_id = s.satisfaction_id WHERE CURDATE() >= lt.end_date ORDER BY lt.end_date ASC

SELECT p.payment_id AS paymentId, s.rating_lecture AS ratingLecture, s.rating_teacher AS ratingTeacher, r.content, sb.name AS subjectName, u.name AS teacherName FROM satisfaction s LEFT JOIN review r ON s.satisfaction_id = r.satisfaction_id INNER JOIN payment p ON s.payment_id = p.payment_id INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON p.enrollment_id = se.enrollment_id INNER JOIN lecture l ON se.lecture_id = l.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject sb ON l.subject_id = sb.subject_id INNER JOIN teacher_assignment ta ON l.lecture_id = ta.lecture_id INNER JOIN user u ON ta.teacher_id = u.user_id WHERE p.payment_id = #{paymentId}

SELECT ad.attend_date AS attendDate, ad.status AS status, sb.name AS subjectName, t.name AS teacherName FROM (SELECT * FROM user WHERE user_id = #{studentId}) u INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON se.student_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN payment p ON se.enrollment_id = p.enrollment_id INNER JOIN attendance ad ON p.payment_id = ad.payment_id INNER JOIN lecture l ON se.lecture_id = l.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject sb ON l.subject_id = sb.subject_id INNER JOIN teacher_assignment ta ON l.lecture_id = ta.lecture_id INNER JOIN user t ON ta.teacher_id = t.user_id
SELECT name AS userName, user_id AS userId FROM user WHERE role_id = 3

SELECT u.name AS teacherName, th.last_education AS lastEducation, th.personal_history AS personalHistory FROM user u INNER JOIN teacher_history th ON u.user_id = th.teacher_id WHERE u.user_id = #{teacherId}

SELECT ROUND(AVG(sf.rating_teacher), 1) AS ratingTeacher FROM satisfaction sf INNER JOIN payment p ON sf.payment_id = p.payment_id INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON p.enrollment_id = se.enrollment_id INNER JOIN lecture lt ON se.lecture_id = lt.lecture_id INNER JOIN teacher_assignment ta ON lt.lecture_id = ta.lecture_id INNER JOIN user t ON ta.teacher_id = t.user_id WHERE ta.teacher_id = #{teacherId}

SELECT sf.rating_teacher AS ratingTeacher, r.content AS content FROM satisfaction sf INNER JOIN payment p ON sf.payment_id = p.payment_id INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON p.enrollment_id = se.enrollment_id INNER JOIN lecture lt ON se.lecture_id = lt.lecture_id INNER JOIN teacher_assignment ta ON lt.lecture_id = ta.lecture_id INNER JOIN review r ON sf.satisfaction_id = r.satisfaction_id WHERE ta.teacher_id = #{teacherId} ORDER BY r.review_id DESC LIMIT 0, 3

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM album
WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%')

SELECT ab.album_id AS albumId, ab.lecture_id AS lectureId, sb.name AS subjectName, ab.title AS title, ab.description, DATE_FORMAT(ab.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS createdAt FROM album ab LEFT OUTER JOIN lecture lt ON lt.lecture_id = ab.lecture_id LEFT OUTER JOIN subject sb ON sb.subject_id = lt.subject_id WHERE ab.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%') LIMIT #{beginRow}, #{size}

SELECT ab.album_id AS albumId, ab.lecture_id AS lectureId, sb.name AS subjectName, ab.title AS title, ab.description, DATE_FORMAT(ab.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS createdAt FROM (SELECT * FROM album WHERE album_id = #{albumId}) ab INNER JOIN lecture lt ON lt.lecture_id = ab.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject sb ON sb.subject_id = lt.subject_id
SELECT photo_id AS photoId, album_id AS albumId, file_path AS filePath FROM album_photo WHERE album_id = #{albumId};
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO satisfaction(payment_id, rating_lecture, rating_teacher) VALUES (#{paymentId}, #{lectureRating}, #{teacherRating})
